overlay_color.label: Overlay color
overlay_color.description: Applies only if there is a background image.

overlay_color.label: Image Overlay
overlay_color.description: Applies only if there is a background image.

values.label: Values for each column (one per line: yes, no, or custom text)

form_token.label: Form Token
form_token.description: Auto-injected when published to Widgetizer. For self-hosted: paste your form token (starts with ft_)

form_name.label: Form Name
form_name.description: Label to identify this form in your submissions dashboard

footerNavigation.label: Navigation Menu
footerNavigation.description: Select the menu to display in the footer

show_social.label: Show social icons
show_social.description: Display social media icons from theme settings

logoImage.label: Logo Image
logoImage.description: Upload a logo image. If provided, this will be displayed instead of the text logo.

logoMaxWidth.label: Logo Max Width
logoMaxWidth.description: Maximum width of the logo image

logoText.label: Logo Text
logoText.description: Text to display in the header logo

contactDetailsLine1.label: Contact Details 1
contactDetailsLine1.description: First line of contact info (e.g., phone)

contactDetailsLine2.label: Contact Details 2
contactDetailsLine2.description: Second line of contact info (e.g., address)

headerNavigation.label: Navigation Menu
headerNavigation.description: Select the menu to display in the header

ctaButtonLink.label: CTA Button
ctaButtonLink.description: Call-to-action button (leave text empty to hide)

full_width.label: Full Width
full_width.description: When enabled, the header stretches across the full viewport. When disabled, it stays centered in a container.

sticky.label: Sticky Header
sticky.description: When enabled, the header stays fixed at the top when scrolling

center_nav.label: Center Navigation
center_nav.description: Centers the navigation menu in the header with the logo on the left and CTA on the right (desktop only)

link.description: Optional link when image is clicked.
link.label: Button 1

fullwidth.description: When enabled, image spans full width. When disabled, image is contained within the theme grid.
fullwidth.label: Full width

features.label: Features (one per line)
features.description: Start a line with + for a checkmark or - for a cross.

features.label: Features (one per line)
features.description: Start a line with + for a checkmark or - for a cross.

features.label: Features (one per line)
features.description: Start a line with + for a checkmark or - for a cross.

overlay_color.label: Overlay color
overlay_color.description: Applies only if there is a background image.

overlay_color.label: Overlay color
overlay_color.description: Applies only if there is a background image.

features.label: Features (one per line)
features.description: Start a line with + for a checkmark or - for a cross.

features.label: Features/bullet points (one per line)
features.description: Start a line with + for a checkmark or - for a cross.

enable_reveal_animations.label: Enable scroll reveal animations
enable_reveal_animations.description: Animate elements as they scroll into view

heading_scale.label: Heading Text Size
heading_scale.description: Scale all heading text sizes up or down

body_scale.label: Body Text Size
body_scale.description: Scale all body text sizes up or down

corner_style.label: Shapes
corner_style.description: Controls the roundness of buttons, cards, images, and form fields

card_style.label: Content boxes
card_style.description: How content sections are visually separated

spacing_density.label: Layout density
spacing_density.description: Controls the amount of whitespace between sections and elements

button_shape.label: Button shape
button_shape.description: Override corner shape specifically for buttons

use_bunny_fonts.label: Use Privacy-Friendly Font CDN
use_bunny_fonts.description: Enable to serve Google Fonts from Bunny CDN (GDPR-compliant, no tracking)

custom_css.label: Custom CSS
custom_css.description: Add custom CSS that will be injected in the <head> section.

custom_head_scripts.label: Custom Head Scripts
custom_head_scripts.description: Add custom scripts (e.g., Google Analytics) that will be injected in the <head> section.

custom_footer_scripts.label: Custom Footer Scripts
custom_footer_scripts.description: Add custom scripts that will be injected before the closing </body> tag.
